item.descr: Disable Indirect Branch Restricted Speculation (Spectre V2 mitigation)
Page Table Isolation (Meltdown mitigation, requires reboot.)
Use at most this many CPUs for netisr processing
Max size of automatic receive buffer
Incrementor step size of automatic send buffer
Max size of automatic send buffer
Size of pf(4) source nodes hashtable
Minimum pool size necessary to cause a reseed
Default netisr per-protocol, per-CPU queue limit if not set by protocol

rule.descr: NAT64 Outbound Rule (translate v6 back to v4)
NAS Webdav -> Proxy Container Traffic 443 HTTPS
Allow CF Source IPs to access VMNET
TEMP Allow Unifi Access from Mgmt
TEMP Allow Unifi Access from Mgmt
NAS Webdav -> Proxy Container Traffic 443 HTTPS
Allow Proxy to forward to NAS (across L3)
Allow NAT64 from internal IFs to NAT64 GW
Default allow Apple Captive Portal Test v4
Default allow Apple Captive Portal Test v6
Default allow Captive to any rule v6
Default allow Captive to any rule v4
Block v4 Traffic on IPv6 only

alias.name: cf_src_ipv4s
alias.description: IPv4 addresses used by Cloudflare where traffic may originate from

alias.name: non_public_nets
alias.description: All networks that are inside or having to do with being inside, eg. multicast, LAN, etc.

alias.name: tayga_v4_pool
alias.description: Tayga v4 Pool used to NAT64

rule.description: Translate AT&T DHCP to AT&T Static

alert.format: From: mini-mailer@goodkind.io Subject: Router: Monitor Instance Changed

location.description: Return 200 OK for CF LB Mon
